$comment: Per-project causal/dependency graph. nodes=modules/files, edges=[cause,effect] (cause is imported-by effect), invariants=health rules the L4 verifier checks before declaring done. Regenerate the skeleton with tools/graphizer.mjs; add invariants BY HAND.

invariants.structured-output: Every LLM call that returns data uses forced tool use with a schema derived from a Pydantic model — never string/regex parsing of prose.
invariants.cost-logged: Every billed LLM call writes one JSONL line (tokens, cost, latency, stop_reason) even on exception — cost.py flushes in finally.
invariants.pricing-honest: Unknown model ids raise in pricing.rates_for(); they never silently price at $0.
invariants.untrusted-input: Lead/company source text is untrusted; it is passed only as user content and must not be able to change tool_choice or system policy.
invariants.no-invented-output: No LLM output is fabricated into docs/READMEs. Live-run sections stay empty until a real key produces them; offline tests use explicit mocks.
invariants.kb-consistency: All Northstar KB docs share one ICP, one competitor set (Clari, Gong Forecast, Mosaic, Pigment), and one pricing table.

freeze_boundary: $comment: globs the driver may edit; everything else is off-limits without explicit user request
